title: [Bug]: espctl flash doesn't see my device
body: When I run `espctl flash build/flash_bundle.tar.gz` it says 'no device found at /dev/cu.usbmodem*'. I just plugged in my ESP32-S3 DevKitC. Is the cable a USB-C charge-only cable? Actually, never mind — switched to a data cable and it worked. Should I close this?
_notes: Reporter self-diagnosed mid-thread; classic user_config (USB cable charge-only). Reply with confirmation and close.
